label: Vm voltage
suggested_sensor_or_logging: VM_PROBE voltage sensor logged by Vm_To_Simulink and Vm_Log
instructions: Open or highlight VM_PROBE; read the Vm timeseries from the Vm_Log To Workspace block after numeric V_c and R_e values are supplied.

label: Amplifier output voltage
suggested_sensor_or_logging: AMP_OUT_PROBE voltage sensor logged by AmpOut_To_Simulink and AmpOut_Log
instructions: Highlight AMP_OUT_PROBE to inspect n_amp_out relative to n_ref; use amp_out_voltage after simulation with numeric parameters.

label: Clamp current through Ro
suggested_sensor_or_logging: I_CLAMP_PROBE current sensor logged by IClamp_To_Simulink and IClamp_Log
instructions: Positive current follows I_CLAMP_PROBE.p to I_CLAMP_PROBE.n, from amplifier output toward R_o and n_vm.

label: Feedback sense voltage
suggested_sensor_or_logging: Feedback_Sense_Sensor currently feeds the amplifier subtractor; add a PS-Simulink converter if direct logging is needed.
instructions: Highlight Feedback_Sense_Sensor and R_e to inspect the feedback measurement path into AMP1_Diff_Subtract.I2.

label: Loop error before gain
suggested_sensor_or_logging: AMP1_Diff_Subtract output drives AMP1_Finite_Gain_100; add a PS-Simulink converter if direct error logging is needed.
instructions: Highlight AMP1_Diff_Subtract and AMP1_Finite_Gain_100 to inspect the finite-gain control law.
